## Meeting Purpose

[To build an AI-led growth engine through a live session](https://fathom.video/share/-pyZ9oM93AqykkWtjy-FfiEZMxuByo4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Discussed where to get started with AI workflows and building examples](https://fathom.video/share/-pyZ9oM93AqykkWtjy-FfiEZMxuByo4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Reviewed concepts around workflows, inputs, variables, and post-processing](https://fathom.video/share/-pyZ9oM93AqykkWtjy-FfiEZMxuByo4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Covered basics of AirOps and prompting, including different models and when to use them](https://fathom.video/share/-pyZ9oM93AqykkWtjy-FfiEZMxuByo4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)

## Topics

### Recap from Last Session

  - [Brainstormed ideas for getting started with AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/-pyZ9oM93AqykkWtjy-FfiEZMxuByo4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Reviewed example workflows in the demo environment](https://fathom.video/share/-pyZ9oM93AqykkWtjy-FfiEZMxuByo4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Began building workflows together, covering key concepts](https://fathom.video/share/-pyZ9oM93AqykkWtjy-FfiEZMxuByo4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)

### Prompting

  - [Discussed the importance of prompting and how it is the first line of approach](https://fathom.video/share/-pyZ9oM93AqykkWtjy-FfiEZMxuByo4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [Covered key elements of a prompt, including directive, examples, output format, style, role/persona, and additional context](https://fathom.video/share/-pyZ9oM93AqykkWtjy-FfiEZMxuByo4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [Demonstrated using the Anthropic Console to generate and improve prompts](https://fathom.video/share/-pyZ9oM93AqykkWtjy-FfiEZMxuByo4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2392.0)

### Building Together

  - [Walked through building a "Movie/TV Character Rewriter" workflow](https://fathom.video/share/-pyZ9oM93AqykkWtjy-FfiEZMxuByo4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=5963.0)
  - [Showed how to incorporate research, examples, and role-playing to generate unique content](https://fathom.video/share/-pyZ9oM93AqykkWtjy-FfiEZMxuByo4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=6437.0)
  - [Demonstrated iterating on the output by adding post-processing steps](https://fathom.video/share/-pyZ9oM93AqykkWtjy-FfiEZMxuByo4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=6481.0)
  - [Built a "Social Post Generator" workflow, highlighting techniques like chained prompts and human review](https://fathom.video/share/-pyZ9oM93AqykkWtjy-FfiEZMxuByo4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=8229.0)

## Next Steps
